titleStmt.title: SII 4.1325: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1325. (A.R. No. 403 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vidhilōkakhēṁddugaṇitēṣvabdēṣva
janayituḥ śrīrājarājaprabhōḥ . dha¨rmmā¨rtthaṁ sukṛtī pradī
pamadiśadbhīmēśvarāyādarī lakṣmīkī¨rttigirāṁ svayaṁvarapatiḥ śrīvī
racōḍāhvayaḥ [. 1*] sasti . svamastabhuvanāśraya śrīpritivallabhamahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭaraka ravikulatilaka cōḍakulaśēkhara paṇḍya
kulāṁtaka samastarājāśraya rājarājēṁdra vīramahēṁdra vikramacōḍa vi
jayābharaṇa rājakēsariva¨rmma pe¨rmmanaḍigalu gaṁggākāvērīpa¨ryyaṁta sapta
mōviṣṇuva¨rddhanu tribhuvanacakrava¨rtti śrīkulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara prava¨rddhamā
navijayarājyasaṁvatsa 43 ṇṭa śrahi dina 330 nuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtinimi
ttamunaṁ beṁdalapāka bhīmayayaina Aḍapa viṣṇuva¨rddhanabrahmādhirāyaru ta
mayyaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina yakhaṇḍava¨rtti
lōhadaṇḍudiviya 1 . dīniki nācaṁdra¨rkkamu neyu sariyiṁcuvārugā śrībhīmē
śvaramahādēvara kilaramuna prōlabōla nāviyayu meṁṭabōla Eṟiyanayu
peddibōla nāvayayuṁ dālarasi navayayu berasina bōlu nalvuruṁ būṇṭa
gāṁ kāṭabōla Eṟiyani yaḍapuna maṁṭikommaya vasamuna viḍcina
vōyaṁgala tribhuvanāṁkuśa nē māna 1 . likhitaṁ ḍakarēmi
Digital edition of SII 4.1325 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
